title: Lesson 39 (Vocab) - スキー, ケース, アイス...
description: スキー (Ski) and アイス (Ice/Ice cream). Most of these are "Free" words if you know English!

items.gloss: case (e.g. receptacle, condition, event, legal action, letter style, etc.); Computer-Aided Software Engineering; CASE
ice; ice cream; icecream; usurer; usury; loansharking

course; route; trail; course (of study); program; lane (in running, swimming, etc.); course (of action); policy; track; path; course (of a multi-course meal); full-course meal; multi-course meal; plan (type of offered service); option; pitch
